offer: For restaurant general managers managing 5-15 employees, inaccurate labor cost reporting causes budget overruns. We automate weekly labor cost reports instead of manual labor cost calculations using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate labor cost reporting leading to budget overruns.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for restaurant managers
Indie Hackers discussions on labor reporting
DM outreach to restaurant managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing restaurant tools
try_it: Let users try manual data entry for employee hours
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with one-liner
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Provide early-access onboarding for initial users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant forums
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for reuse
Set default reminders for report generation
Allow CSV import for existing employee data
Simplify onboarding process with fewer steps
